items.title: How Much Is the 2026 Daytona 500 Purse? See the Record Prize Money, Payout
items.description: The purse for the Daytona 500 has increased for the fourth consecutive year, with the 2026 total breaking motorsports records.

items.title: 'The Big One' At Daytona 500 Involves 20 Cars In Huge Wreck Up Front
items.description: Sunday's Daytona 500 was relatively smooth-sailing through the first 123 laps, and then "The Big One" happened.

items.title: WATCH: INDYCAR Drivers Star in Ads Ahead of 2026 Season
items.description: Get those engines warmed up for the 2026 INDYCAR season with a few new ads featuring some of the sport's most famous faces.

items.title: Kylan Boswell Returns as No. 8 Illinois Beats Indiana, 71-51
items.description: No. 8 Illinois rebounded from back-to-back overtime losses with a 71-51 victory over Indiana on Sunday.
